content:
🚀 THE-Process-Manager | Makefile
🎯 Primary Use Case: Real-time system monitoring and process management via a terminal user interface.
✨ Key Features: • Retrieve and Display Process Data • CPU and Memory Usage Calculations • Sorting • Detailed Process Information
📖 Summary: THE Process Manager is a Rust-based TUI application for real-time system monitoring. It retrieves and displays detailed CPU and memory usage for running processes, offering sorting and filtering capabilities.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
